name: Andrew

paragraphs: To contact me, just DM me on Instagram! My DMs are open.

bios.title: Bio
paragraphs: Cashier by day, software developer by night. Either way, I'm good with my hands.

bios.title: Future-proof
paragraphs: Do you want your boyfriend to be an investment? If so, I'm the right guy for you. As a web developer, within a few years, I'll be financially secure (probably).

bios.title: Location
paragraphs: You can contact me if you're in the local area. If not, then feel free to contact me anyways, but I probably can't fly out.

contact: Use the bar at the top to find out ways you can contact me.
